theme.name: Organic & Earthy Pastel
theme.description: A calm, tactile, and intentional interface that feels like a quiet pottery studio or a zen garden. Designed to reduce choice paralysis, lower heart rates, and provide a welcoming experience for both elders (high contrast, clear targets) and Gen Z (modern, organic aesthetic).

rules: Headings must use Cormorant Garamond for an editorial, therapeutic, and human touch.
Body text must use Outfit for maximum legibility across generations.
Never center-align long paragraphs. Left-align for reading ease.
Use text-text_primary for main text, never pure black.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (2-3x typical density). Let the interface breathe.
spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 sm:px-8 py-12 md:py-24

surfaces_and_textures.noise_overlay: Apply a subtle SVG noise/grain overlay (opacity-40, mix-blend-multiply) to the main background to remove digital flatness and make it feel like paper/canvas.
surfaces_and_textures.cards: Flat solid surfaces (surface color) with a delicate 1px border (border color). No harsh drop shadows. Use subtle ambient shadow on hover: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(42,50,41,0.06)].
surfaces_and_textures.glassmorphism: Avoid traditional cold glass. If transparency is needed, use warm tinted blur: bg-[#FAF9F6]/80 backdrop-blur-xl.

buttons.primary: bg-[#8A9A86] text-white hover:bg-[#788774] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 transform hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2A3229] text-[#2A3229] hover:bg-[#2A3229] hover:text-[#FAF9F6] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

mood_cards.style: bg-[#F2EFEB] border border-[#E3E1DB] rounded-3xl p-8 cursor-pointer transition-all duration-500 hover:bg-[#EAE7E1] hover:-translate-y-1 relative overflow-hidden
mood_cards.content: Large typography, ample negative space, lucide-react icon (strokeWidth 1.5) in top left.

audio_player.container: bg-[#F2EFEB] rounded-3xl p-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(42,50,41,0.05)]
audio_player.visualizer: A pulsing CSS 'breathing circle' in the center (bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#8A9A86] to-[#D9B8B5] opacity-20 blur-2xl rounded-full w-48 h-48 animate-breathe absolute -z-10)
audio_player.controls: Large, accessible touch targets (min 48x48px). Lucide icons.

animations.breathing_pulse: keyframes: { breathe: { '0%, 100%': { transform: 'scale(1)', opacity: '0.5' }, '50%': { transform: 'scale(1.15)', opacity: '0.8' } } }, animation: 'breathe 6s ease-in-out infinite'
animations.transitions: Use framer-motion for smooth, soft page transitions. initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}, animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}, transition={{ duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }}.
animations.loading_state: Full screen ambient breathing orb (sage and rose overlapping blurs) with text 'Curating your peace...' fading in and out.

images.description: Flat lay of soft green leaves, used sparingly as a masked background texture or welcome screen graphic.
Soft pink ranunculus petals macro, useful for the 'Seeking Renewal' or completion screen background hints.
Calming zen garden sand texture, excellent for the background of the loading state.

accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all interactive elements to support elder users.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA. Use #2A3229 on #FAF9F6.
accessibility.test_ids: Every button, card, and input MUST have a role-based data-testid (e.g., data-testid='mood-card-seeking-serenity', data-testid='play-pause-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette. Do NOT use default Tailwind grays, blues, or purples.
Install and configure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts.
Use framer-motion for the multi-step wizard transitions (AnimatePresence mode='wait').
Implement the 'breathing' animation using Tailwind arbitrary values or tailwind.config.js extend.
Create a custom Noise component (SVG filter) and position it fixed with pointer-events-none over the entire app.
Use lucide-react for all icons. Set strokeWidth to 1.5 for a delicate, refined look.

The Audio Player should use standard HTML5 Audio API (or mock it elegantly if no real audio files are available, since the prompt says 'frontend-only UI state' for feedback, mock the audio playback progress visually).
Do not use Shadcn 'Card' components if they restrict the custom padding/borders. Build custom divs for the mood cards using the classes provided.
Ensure the feedback screen is a seamless state transition after the audio progress bar reaches 100%.
